raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX, My Citibank Macys Credit Card was charged {$230.00} by XXXX XXXX. Upon seeing this charge appear, I filed a dispute. After crediting my account for the disputed funds, the dispute was overturned on XXXX, with the CC provider claiming that this was a merchant that charges my account regularly. When I attempted to access my statements, there were no statements available for viewing. I did not authorize any such payment and I do not want to pay for a transaction I did not authorize.
